title: Performance Enhancer Next Create - PENC
description: PENC allows you to enjoy Create with the best performance as possible, without touching anything else.
body:

| **[PENC Vulkan](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penc-vulkan)** | **Yes**  (Best performace with Vulkan) | **No**  (It totally changes the game) | **Yes**  (Adds utilities and improvements) | **Yes**  (Only has Create) | Vanilla Create experience |

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/penc-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENC-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Description**
Lets you enjoy Create with the best performance as posible, always trying to exceed with each update. So that you can dominate the world, one cogwheel at a time!

Differs with the **[PENC+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pencplus)** version (with the +) because this has no utilities and improvements, has only has the performance thing. So if you are looking for not only the best performance but the best addition, you better download **[PENC+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pencplus)**.

### **Important**

<details>
<summary>To enable Simple Voice Chat and AutoModpack mods</summary>

You will have to port forward the following ports on the server:

Simple Voice Chat >>> Port: `24454`. Protocol: `UDP`.

AutoModpack >>> Port: `30037`. Protocol: `TCP`.

If you don't now how search for a tutorial. Yes, I know I'm not being helpfull over there but the thing is it varies on the server page. Join my Discord so someone may help you, [Discord invite link](https://discord.gg/HFatSHXhJf).

</details>

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/penc-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENC-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Other modpacks**
**Want more utilities and improvements? Try out [PENC+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pencplus).**

**Interested only in the performance? Try out [PEN](https://modrinth.com/modpack/pen) or [PEN+](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penplus).**

**Want not only the best performance but the best mods? Try out [PENM](https://modrinth.com/modpack/penm).**

**[Check my other non Vulkan modpacks.](https://modrinth.com/user/AselElisian/modpacks)**

# **License**
Please do not redistribute from outside of Modrinth, I may upload the modpack to CurseForge in the future.

You can use the modpack to begin a new one if you link back this page.

![Separator](https://github.com/AselElisian/penc-minecraft-modpack/blob/main/Images/PENC-Separator.png?raw=true)

# **Credits**
All the mods used are not mine, I am a simply messenger that ease in the making of a modpack. The hard work is made by the modders. Please thank them as I do, and if you very like a mod go to its page and support the creator.
